text:
1. First, note the time difference: US/Pacific is UTC - 7 (in 1489, we assume a similar offset for simplicity), and Asia/Tokyo is UTC + 9. So the time difference between Asia/Tokyo and US/Pacific is (9 - (-7)) = 16 hours.
2. Add the time difference to the given time: 11:00 + 16:00 = 27:00.
3. Adjust for the 24 - hour clock: 27:00 - 24:00 = 03:00, and the date advances by one day to August 20, 1489.
FINAL_ANSWER: 03:00 on August 20, 1489
